LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT ARCADIOS PRODUCE, INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR, IN THE ALTERNATIVE, SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED AND ITS ALTERNATE MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS DENIED AS TO THE FIRST AND SECOND CAUSES OF ACTION AND GRANTED AS TO THE THIRD AND FOURTH CAUSES OF ACTION. SEE MINUTES IN WORD FORMAT FOR THE COURT'S RULING IN ITS ENTIRETY. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN, CLERK: E. LARNAUTI, NOT REPORTED

Off Calendar Jun-06-2025 Off Calendar

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication (Motions)
Off Calendar May-30-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT ARCADIOS PRODUCE, INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR, IN THE
ALTERNATIVE, SUMMARY ADJUDICATION

Appearances: Geoffrey R. Pittman and Ben Mains of Jackson Lewis PC (415.394.9400) for defendant and moving party; Garen Nadir of The Work Justice Firm (323.775.9000) for plaintiff and responding party.

Argued and the court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Defendant Arcadios Produce, Inc.'s motion for summary judgment is denied and its alternate motion for summary adjudication is denied as to the first and second causes of action for hostile work environment sexual harassment and failure to prevent harassment and granted as to the third and fourth causes of action for FEHA retaliation and wrongful termination in violation of public policy.

See minutes in Word format for the court's ruling in its entirety.

Prevailing party to submit a proposed order. Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (301/HEK)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-25-2024 Set For Trial On Jun-30-25 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
